office_does: County commissioners adopt budgets and policy, oversee departments and infrastructure, and represent county residents.
race_blurb: The five-candidate field includes an incumbent, a PUD commissioner, business and community challengers, and one candidate without a detailed platform.

candidates.summary: Eckstein is a community candidate emphasizing housing, working families, public services, infrastructure, and transparency.
highlights: Emphasizes services, infrastructure, and transparent government [S2]

experience.basis: The dossier establishes community candidacy but no elected or county-management record.

candidates.summary: Wheeler is a small-business owner with animal-welfare and community experience emphasizing local tailoring, transparency, businesses, services, and pragmatic administration.
highlights: Emphasizes locally tailored and transparent administration [S2]

experience.basis: Business and community experience support renewal while providing some relevant background.

candidates.summary: The approved sources verify Toerber’s candidacy but do not establish a detailed platform or governing record.
highlights: Candidacy is verified by official and local sources [S1][S2]

candidates.summary: Brummer is the incumbent commissioner and a former habitat biologist, farmer, business owner, and pastor emphasizing restraint, safety, housing, services, growth, and opposition to state overreach.
highlights: Has regional transportation, flood, workforce, and economic-development assignments [S2]

spending.basis: Spending restraint is an explicit governing priority backed by an incumbent record.

experience.basis: Incumbency and a broad regional governing record establish the strongest proven-record pole.

candidates.summary: Hadaller is an elected PUD commissioner and business owner emphasizing fiscal responsibility, infrastructure, safety, and constituent service.
highlights: Serves as an elected PUD commissioner [S2]

spending.basis: Fiscal responsibility supports a modest restraint orientation without a specific cut mechanism.

experience.basis: PUD commission service supplies an elected local governing record, though not county-commission tenure.
